# WebWaka OS — Verticals Execution Prompts: Professional Extended + Creator Extended

**Document type:** Agent execution prompt set
**Scope:** Professional (7) + Creator (4) extended verticals — 11 verticals covered
**Repo:** https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os
**Branch base:** `main`
**Milestone targets:** M9–M12
**Status:** Ready for agent execution — P1 Creator and Professional verticals complete (M8e)
**Generated by:** MASTER_CONTINUATION_PROMPT.md — Set H

---

> **3-in-1 Platform Note:**
> Professional verticals serve **Pillar 1 (Ops)**, **Pillar 2 (Branding)** (firm websites), and **Pillar 3 (Marketplace)** (professional discovery).
> Creator verticals serve **Pillar 1 (Ops)** + **Pillar 2 (Branding)** (artist/studio portfolio) + **Pillar 3 (Marketplace)** (talent discovery).
> **SuperAgent AI is cross-cutting — NOT a fourth pillar.**
> **Critical AI governance for Professional verticals:**
> - Law firm vertical: **L3 HITL mandatory for all AI** — client matter data is legally privileged and must NEVER enter AI prompts (P13 + legal privilege); even matter reference IDs need extreme care
> - Tax/accounting: L2 for billing analytics; **L3 HITL** for tax advice output
> - Other professional: L2 standard cap
> - Creator verticals: L2 cap; royalty and talent deal data never passed to AI (P13)

### General rules for all agents using these prompts

- Never make assumptions about WebWaka's architecture. Always read the referenced documents and code first.
- Legal privilege is a hard boundary: law firm client data and matter details must NEVER appear in any AI prompt or SuperAgent call.
- Professional fees must be in kobo (P9). Royalty splits must be in kobo (P9). No float monetary values anywhere.
- No cross-tenant data leakage (T3). Every D1 query scopes to `tenant_id`.

---

## PROFESSIONAL VERTICALS

---

## TASK V-PRO-EXT-1: Accounting Firm / Audit Practice Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `accounting-firm`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — ICAN and ANAN-registered firms are critical for Nigerian SME compliance; FIRS tax filing integration readiness; IFRS compliance tracking
- **Milestone target:** M9
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:**
  - Verticals master plan: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/verticals-master-plan.md
  - 3-in-1 platform architecture: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/3in1-platform-architecture.md
  - Verticals FSM engine: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/packages/verticals/src/
  - Platform invariants: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/platform-invariants.md
  - Entitlement model: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/entitlement-model.md
  - AI integration framework: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/ai-integration-framework.md
  - SuperAgent product spec: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/superagent/02-product-spec.md
  - Professional vertical (M8e reference): https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/packages/verticals-professional/

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in accounting practice management software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian accounting and audit sector — ICAN (Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria), ANAN (Association of National Accountants of Nigeria), FIRS (Federal Inland Revenue Service) tax agent registration, IFRS compliance, CAMA 2020 accounting requirements for companies
- Client engagement management, audit timeline tracking, professional fee billing in kobo, ICAN CPD credit tracking
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine
- P13: client financial data is confidential — only billing aggregates and engagement counts in AI prompts; no client names or financials

---

**1. Mandatory context reading (100% before execution):**

- `docs/governance/verticals-master-plan.md` — Professional verticals; entry for `accounting-firm`
- `docs/governance/3in1-platform-architecture.md`
- `docs/governance/platform-invariants.md` — P2, P9, P10, P12, P13, T3, T4
- `infra/db/seeds/0004_verticals-master.csv` — row for `accounting-firm`
- `packages/verticals/src/` — FSM engine; `packages/auth/src/guards.ts`
- `docs/governance/ai-integration-framework.md`; `infra/db/migrations/` — next migration number
- `packages/verticals-professional/src/` — reference M8e professional base pattern

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigerian accounting firm market — ICAN member count (~50,000), ANAN members, average audit engagement fee for SME (₦200,000–₦5M), FIRS tax audit compliance demand; competitors: no dedicated Nigerian accounting firm SaaS; manual management, Sage, QuickBooks; key features: client register (client_ref_id opaque, engagement_type: audit/tax/bookkeeping/advisory, engagement_fee_kobo), engagement timeline (tasks, milestones, deadlines), FIRS submission reference tracking, ICAN CPD log per partner, invoice management, retainer billing.

Execution plan:
- **Objective:** Give Nigerian accounting firms a digital client engagement register, professional fee billing, FIRS tax calendar, ICAN CPD tracking, and AI billing pipeline analysis
- **Schema:**
  - `accounting_firm_profiles` — firm_name, ICAN_firm_number, ANAN_reg, FIRS_tax_agent_reg, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status
  - `accounting_engagements` — client_ref_id TEXT, engagement_type (audit/tax/advisory/bookkeeping), engagement_fee_kobo, start_date INTEGER, end_date INTEGER, firs_submission_ref TEXT, status (active/submitted/completed), tenant_id
  - `accounting_invoices` — engagement_id, invoice_number TEXT, amount_kobo, issued_date INTEGER, paid_date INTEGER, outstanding_kobo, tenant_id
  - `accounting_cpd_log` — partner_name, training_name, provider, cpd_hours INTEGER, completion_date INTEGER, tenant_id
- **FSM states:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `ican_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `BILLING_FORECAST` (engagement pipeline revenue trend), `ENGAGEMENT_PIPELINE_REPORT` — L2; Growth plan; aggregate engagement counts and revenue by type — no client_ref_id or engagement details (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **Regulatory hook:** ICAN firm number + FIRS tax agent registration at `ican_verified`
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for professional fee collection; Tier 3 for audit engagements involving companies with turnover above ₦100M

---

**3. Implementation workflow:**

Branch: `feat/vertical-accounting-firm`. `registerAccountingFirmVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Kobo (P9). Client_ref_id opaque. No client financial data in AI (P13). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:**

**Test file:** `packages/verticals-accounting-firm/src/accounting-firm.test.ts`

Positive: register; FSM to `ican_verified`; engagement with integer engagement_fee_kobo; invoice with integer amount_kobo, outstanding_kobo; CPD log with integer cpd_hours; AI billing forecast with aiRights + NDPR (aggregate only). Negative: client financial data in AI → P13 blocked; fractional kobo; cross-tenant → 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM → typed error. Security: unauth → 401; KYC → 403.

**Minimum test count: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:**

```bash
git commit -m "feat(vertical/accounting-firm): Accounting Firm vertical — engagements, billing, ICAN CPD, AI pipeline (M9)"
git push origin feat/vertical-accounting-firm
```
PR checklist: FSM, migration, `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`, labeled, P13 client data exclusion, SuperAgent L2, T3, ≥15 tests, zero errors.

## TASK V-PRO-EXT-2: Event Planner / MC Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `event-planner`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Event planning is a booming sector in Nigeria; owambe culture drives massive wedding and social event planning industry; Lagos and Abuja event planners manage multi-million naira budgets
- **Milestone target:** M9
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in event planning and management software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian event planning sector — owambe social event culture, corporate events, state event licence requirements, CAC registration for event management companies; vendor management (caterers, decorators, DJs, ushers), event budget management in kobo, deposit tracking.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigerian event management market — average wedding event budget (₦1M–₦20M), corporate event market, event planner certification landscape (ACE, ILEA Nigeria chapter); competitors: no dedicated Nigerian event planner SaaS; HoneyBook, Aisle Planner (imported), WhatsApp management; key features: event register (event_type, client_phone, event_date, guest_count, total_budget_kobo, deposit_kobo), vendor roster (vendor_type: caterer/decorator/DJ/MC/usher, vendor_phone, agreed_fee_kobo), task checklist, state event licence tracking, MC calendar, day-of timeline.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `event_planner_profiles` (company_name, state_event_licence, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `planned_events` (client_phone, event_type (wedding/birthday/corporate/funeral/other), event_date INTEGER, venue, guest_count INTEGER, total_budget_kobo, deposit_kobo, balance_kobo, status (enquiry/confirmed/in_planning/day_of/completed), tenant_id); `event_vendors` (event_id, vendor_type, vendor_phone, vendor_name, agreed_fee_kobo, deposit_paid_kobo, status (booked/confirmed/cancelled), tenant_id); `event_tasks` (event_id, task_name, due_date INTEGER, completed BOOLEAN, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `licence_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `ENGAGEMENT_PIPELINE_REPORT` (event pipeline revenue), `SALES_FORECAST` (seasonal demand) — L2; Growth plan; aggregate event counts and revenue by type — no client phone or event details (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for event deposit collection; Tier 3 for events above ₦5M total budget

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-event-planner`. `registerEventPlannerVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Kobo (P9). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12). No client details in AI (P13).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `licence_verified`; event with integer total_budget_kobo, deposit_kobo, guest_count; vendor with integer agreed_fee_kobo; task created and completed; AI pipeline with aiRights + NDPR; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/event-planner): Event Planner vertical — events, vendors, task checklist, AI pipeline (M9)"`. PR checklist standard.

## TASK V-PRO-EXT-3: Law Firm / Legal Practice Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `law-firm`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Nigeria has over 120,000 registered lawyers; NBA Lagos, Abuja, Kano branches; legal practice management is a major underserved SaaS category
- **Milestone target:** M9
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in legal practice management software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian legal profession — NBA (Nigerian Bar Association) practising certificate, NJC (National Judicial Council), court filing procedures (Federal High Court, State High Courts, Magistrate Courts, Court of Appeal), legal professional privilege
- **CRITICAL LEGAL PRIVILEGE:** Client matter data, case strategy, privileged communications are absolutely protected. No matter details, client names, case descriptions, or any client-related content may pass to the AI layer under any circumstances. P13 here is absolute. Violation = blocking error.
- Matter management (matter_ref_id opaque), billing (time entry in integer minutes × rate_per_hour_kobo), court calendar, NBA CPD tracking
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents + `docs/governance/ai-architecture-decision-log.md` for legal privilege rule + L3 HITL.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigerian legal services market — NBA member count, litigation vs transaction vs advisory work split, average law firm revenue per partner (₦5M–₦200M annually), legal tech adoption rate; competitors: Clio (global), PracticePanther (imported); no dominant Nigerian legal SaaS; key features: matter register (matter_ref_id opaque, matter_type: litigation/transaction/advisory/criminal/family, matter_fee_kobo), time tracking (matter_ref_id, fee_earner_ref_id, time_minutes INTEGER, rate_per_hour_kobo, amount_kobo), court calendar (matter_ref_id, court_date INTEGER, court_name, hearing_type), NBA practising cert renewal, client invoice (invoice_number, total_kobo).

Execution plan:
- **Schema:**
  - `law_firm_profiles` — firm_name, NBA_firm_registration, NBA_branch, NJC_affiliated, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status
  - `legal_matters` — matter_ref_id TEXT (opaque UUID — NEVER client name), matter_type, billing_type (retainer/hourly/fixed/contingency), agreed_fee_kobo, status (active/closed/archived), tenant_id
  - `legal_time_entries` — matter_ref_id, fee_earner_ref_id TEXT, time_minutes INTEGER, rate_per_hour_kobo, amount_kobo, entry_date INTEGER, tenant_id
  - `legal_court_calendar` — matter_ref_id, court_date INTEGER, court_name, court_type (FHC/SHC/Appeal/Magistrate), hearing_type, tenant_id
  - `legal_invoices` — matter_ref_id, invoice_number TEXT, total_kobo, paid_kobo, outstanding_kobo, issued_date INTEGER, tenant_id
- **FSM states:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `nba_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `BILLING_FORECAST` (billing rate trend on aggregate data) — **L3 HITL MANDATORY** for all AI calls; aggregate billing hours and revenue by matter_type only — never matter_ref_id, client identity, or case details (P13 + legal privilege); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **Regulatory hook:** NBA practising certificate number at `nba_verified` for all named lawyers
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for professional fee collection; Tier 3 for client fund management (EFCC reporting)

---

**3. Implementation:**

Branch: `feat/vertical-law-firm`. `registerLawFirmVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. All monetary in kobo (P9). Time in integer minutes. **L3 HITL flag mandatory on ALL SuperAgent calls.** Matter_ref_id is opaque UUID — no client identity in any column. Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:**

**Test file:** `packages/verticals-law-firm/src/law-firm.test.ts`

Positive: register; FSM to `nba_verified`; matter with opaque matter_ref_id and integer agreed_fee_kobo; time entry with integer time_minutes, amount_kobo; court date logged; invoice with integer total_kobo; AI billing forecast with HITL + aiRights + NDPR (aggregate billing hours by matter type only). Negative: client name in any DB column → schema error (P13 absolute); matter details in AI payload → blocked; HITL flag missing → blocked; fractional kobo; cross-tenant → 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM → typed error. Security: unauth → 401; KYC → 403.

**CRITICAL TESTS:**
1. Schema validation rejects any column value that resembles a client name pattern
2. All SuperAgent calls must have `autonomy_level: "L3_HITL"` — missing flag = blocking failure
3. Matter_ref_id must be UUID format — reject non-opaque identifiers

**Minimum test count: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:**

```bash
git commit -m "feat(vertical/law-firm): Law Firm vertical — matter management, time billing, NBA compliance, L3 HITL AI (M9)"
git push origin feat/vertical-law-firm
```
PR checklist:
- [ ] L3 HITL mandatory on ALL AI routes — blocking if missing
- [ ] P13 absolute: client identity never in any D1 column
- [ ] Matter_ref_id opaque UUID enforced
- [ ] Time entries in integer minutes
- [ ] `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- [ ] PR labeled: `3in1:pillar-1`, `3in1:pillar-2`, `3in1:pillar-3`
- [ ] NBA verification gate tested
- [ ] T3 on all D1 queries; USSD blocked; NDPR gated
- [ ] Tests ≥ 15, all passing including L3 HITL and P13 schema tests
- [ ] Zero typecheck/lint errors

## TASK V-PRO-EXT-4: Burial / Funeral Home Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `funeral-home`
- **Priority:** P3-Specialist — Growing formal funeral service sector in Nigerian cities; state health authority permit, body storage, burial arrangement management; extremely sensitive data (P13 mandatory)
- **Milestone target:** M12
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in funeral home and mortuary management software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian funeral service sector — state health authority mortuary permit, local government burial permit, church/mosque coordination, embalming certification; deceased data is the most sensitive category — P13 strictly enforced; family/client phone for billing only; no deceased identity to AI layer; L3 HITL for all AI.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents. P13 and L3 HITL read with special care for deceased person data.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: case register (case_ref_id opaque — not deceased name, date_of_passing INTEGER, family_contact_phone, burial_type: christian/muslim/traditional), service package (embalming, casket, hearse, burial permit coordination, cost_per_service_kobo), billing (total_kobo, deposit_kobo, balance_kobo), state burial permit reference, cold storage log.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `funeral_home_profiles` (business_name, state_mortuary_permit, LG_burial_permit, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `funeral_cases` (case_ref_id TEXT, family_contact_phone, burial_type, date_of_passing INTEGER, burial_date INTEGER, total_kobo, deposit_kobo, balance_kobo, burial_permit_ref TEXT, status (active/completed), tenant_id); `funeral_services` (case_ref_id, service_type (embalming/casket/hearse/flowers/venue/burial_permit), cost_kobo, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `mortuary_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `BILLING_FORECAST` (service revenue by type) — **L3 HITL mandatory** — aggregate counts and revenue by service type only; no case_ref_id, deceased identity, or family details (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for service billing; Tier 3 for insurance-linked funeral cover management

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-funeral-home`. `registerFuneralHomeVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Case_ref_id opaque UUID. No deceased identity in AI. L3 HITL on all AI. Kobo (P9). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `mortuary_verified`; case with opaque case_ref_id, integer total_kobo, deposit_kobo; service with integer cost_kobo; billing tracked; AI billing forecast with HITL + aiRights + NDPR; case_ref_id in AI → P13 blocked; HITL missing → blocked; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/funeral-home): Funeral Home vertical — case management, billing, L3 HITL AI (M12)"`. PR checklist: L3 HITL, P13 deceased identity, mortuary permit gate, standard checks.

## TASK V-PRO-EXT-6: Tax Consultant / Revenue Agent Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `tax-consultant`

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in tax practice management software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian tax practice — FIRS (Federal Inland Revenue Service) tax agent certificate, CITN (Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria) membership, VAT filing, CIT (Company Income Tax), PAYE remittance tracking; client tax liabilities in kobo; **L3 HITL for any tax advice AI output**; client tax data is privileged (P13).

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents + ADL L3 HITL for tax advice.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: client tax file (client_ref_id opaque, tax_type: VAT/CIT/PAYE/WHT, FIRS_TIN, filing_period, liability_kobo, filed_date, status), FIRS submission reference tracking, tax remittance log, CITN CPD log, professional fee billing.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `tax_consultant_profiles` (firm_name, FIRS_tax_agent_cert, CITN_membership, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `tax_client_files` (client_ref_id TEXT, tax_type, firs_tin TEXT, filing_period TEXT, liability_kobo, filed_date INTEGER, firs_ref TEXT, status (pending/filed/assessed/paid/appealed), tenant_id); `tax_remittances` (client_ref_id, tax_type, period TEXT, amount_kobo, remittance_date INTEGER, bank_ref TEXT, tenant_id); `tax_billing` (client_ref_id, period TEXT, professional_fee_kobo, paid_kobo, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `firs_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `BILLING_FORECAST` (filing calendar revenue) — **L3 HITL for any tax advice output** — aggregate filing counts and fee revenue only; no client_ref_id, TIN, or liability details (P13 + tax privilege); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for professional fee billing; Tier 3 for client fund management (tax remittance above ₦10M)

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-tax-consultant`. `registerTaxConsultantVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. L3 HITL on all AI. Client_ref_id opaque. Kobo (P9). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `firs_verified`; tax file with integer liability_kobo; remittance with integer amount_kobo; billing with integer professional_fee_kobo; AI billing forecast with HITL + aiRights + NDPR; client TIN in AI → P13 blocked; HITL missing → blocked; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `wedding-planner`
- **Priority:** P3-Specialist — Nigeria's wedding industry is one of Africa's largest; owambe-scale weddings with ₦5M–₦100M budgets; specialist wedding planners with portfolio branding
- **Milestone target:** M12
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in luxury wedding planning management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian wedding industry — owambe culture, Lagos Island luxury weddings, destination weddings (Abuja, Enugu), legal marriage registrar coordination (CAC State marriages), aso-ebi coordination, multi-vendor management; wedding budget in kobo, deposit tracking.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: wedding register (bride_ref/groom_ref — opaque, event_date, venue, guest_count, total_budget_kobo, deposit_kobo), vendor management (caterer, decorator, photographer, DJ, ushers — each with agreed_fee_kobo), task checklist (pre-wedding, day-of, post-wedding), legal registrar reference, celebrant certificate tracking.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `wedding_planner_profiles` (company_name, CAC_RC, celebrant_cert (if legal celebrant), workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `wedding_events` (event_date INTEGER, venue, guest_count INTEGER, total_budget_kobo, deposit_kobo, balance_kobo, style (traditional/church/nikah/court/destination), status (enquiry/booked/planning/day_of/completed), tenant_id); `wedding_vendors` (event_id, vendor_type, vendor_phone, agreed_fee_kobo, deposit_paid_kobo, status, tenant_id); `wedding_tasks` (event_id, task_name, category (venue/catering/styling/legal/logistics), due_date INTEGER, completed BOOLEAN, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `cac_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `ENGAGEMENT_PIPELINE_REPORT` (wedding pipeline revenue, seasonal peaks) — L2; Growth plan; aggregate counts and budget ranges — no couple details (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for event deposit collection; Tier 3 for events above ₦10M total budget

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-wedding-planner`. `registerWeddingPlannerVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Kobo (P9). No couple PII in AI (P13). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `cac_verified`; event with integer total_budget_kobo, deposit_kobo, guest_count; vendor with integer agreed_fee_kobo; task completed; AI pipeline with aiRights + NDPR; couple details in AI → P13 blocked; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/wedding-planner): Wedding Planner vertical — events, vendors, task checklist, AI pipeline (M12)"`. PR checklist standard + P13 couple data exclusion.

## CREATOR VERTICALS

---

## TASK V-CRT-EXT-1: Music Studio / Recording Studio Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `music-studio`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Nigeria's music industry is the largest in Africa (Afrobeats global phenomenon); thousands of recording studios in Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt; COSON and MCSN royalty tracking
- **Milestone target:** M10
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links + creator vertical M8e reference)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in music studio management and creator economy software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian music industry — COSON (Copyright Society of Nigeria) licensing, MCSN (Musical Copyright Society of Nigeria), APRA-AMCOS awareness for Nigerian-diaspora artists, studio session booking, beat licensing, artiste royalty tracking in kobo
- Session booking management, producer rate tracking, equipment inventory, streaming revenue reference, brand deal reference
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine
- Creator vertical (M8e): reference `packages/verticals-creator/` for base pattern
- P13: individual artiste deal terms and royalty splits must never pass to AI layer

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents + `packages/verticals-creator/src/` for base creator pattern.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigerian music studio market — studio density in Lagos (Mavin, Empire Mates, DMW, independent studios), average session rate (₦30,000–₦500,000 per day), beat licensing market, Afrobeats producer ecosystem; competitors: no dedicated Nigerian studio SaaS; Studio Pro, StudioLinked (US-only); key features: studio session booking (artiste_ref_id opaque, booking_date, hours INTEGER, session_rate_kobo, engineer_ref_id, status), beat licensing catalogue (beat_name, producer_ref_id, license_type: exclusive/non-exclusive, license_fee_kobo), equipment register, COSON membership tracking.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `music_studio_profiles` (studio_name, COSON_membership, MCSN_registration, CAC_RC, studio_type (recording/mixing/mastering/rehearsal/all), workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `studio_sessions` (artiste_ref_id TEXT, engineer_ref_id TEXT, booking_date INTEGER, hours INTEGER, session_rate_kobo, total_kobo, status (booked/confirmed/completed/cancelled), tenant_id); `studio_beats` (beat_name, producer_ref_id TEXT, genre, bpm INTEGER, license_type, license_fee_kobo, streams_reference TEXT, tenant_id); `studio_equipment` (equipment_name, brand, purchase_cost_kobo, condition (excellent/good/fair/needs_repair), tenant_id)
- **FSM states:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `coson_registered` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `STUDIO_UTILIZATION_REPORT` (aggregate bookings by genre/time) — L2; Growth plan; artiste_ref_id only in aggregate counts — no session rates or deal terms (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **Regulatory hook:** COSON membership number at `coson_registered`; MCSN registration stored
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for session billing; Tier 3 for exclusive beat licensing above ₦5M

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-music-studio`. `registerMusicStudioVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Session hours as integer. Kobo (P9). BPM as integer. Artiste_ref_id opaque. Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12). No royalty splits or deal terms in AI (P13).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `coson_registered`; session with integer hours, session_rate_kobo, total_kobo; beat with integer license_fee_kobo, bpm; equipment with integer purchase_cost_kobo; AI utilisation report with aiRights + NDPR (aggregate genre stats); royalty split in AI → P13 blocked; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/music-studio): Music Studio vertical — session booking, beat catalogue, COSON, AI utilisation (M10)"`. PR checklist: COSON gate, P13 royalty/deal exclusion, standard checks.

## TASK V-CRT-EXT-3: Record Label / Music Publisher Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `recording-label`
- **Priority:** P3-Specialist — Nigerian record labels (Mavin Records, Empire Mates Entertainment, Chocolate City, Spaceship) are full businesses; artiste roster management, royalty accounting, distribution deals; COSON and MCSN mandatory
- **Milestone target:** M12
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in record label and music publishing management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian record label business — COSON royalty collection and distribution, MCSN publishing rights, artiste contract management (deals are P13 — never to AI), royalty split tracking (split fractions stored as integer basis points out of 10,000 — never floats), distribution deal management (Boomplay, Audiomack, streaming platforms), release management.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents. Royalty split fractions must be stored as integer basis points (e.g., 70.5% = 7050 basis points) — no floats anywhere.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: artiste roster (artiste_ref_id opaque, royalty_split_bps INTEGER (basis points out of 10000), status), release catalogue (release_name, release_date, artiste_ref_id, streams_ref TEXT, streaming_revenue_kobo), royalty distribution log (artiste_ref_id, period TEXT, gross_kobo, artiste_share_kobo, label_share_kobo), distribution deal reference (platform_name, distribution_rate_bps INTEGER), COSON registration tracking.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `recording_label_profiles` (label_name, COSON_membership, MCSN_registration, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `label_artistes` (artiste_ref_id TEXT, royalty_split_bps INTEGER, contract_start INTEGER, contract_end INTEGER, status (signed/released/suspended), tenant_id); `label_releases` (artiste_ref_id, release_name, genre, release_date INTEGER, streaming_revenue_kobo, tenant_id); `label_royalty_distributions` (artiste_ref_id, period TEXT, gross_kobo, artiste_share_kobo, label_share_kobo, distributed_date INTEGER, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `coson_registered` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `STUDIO_UTILIZATION_REPORT` adapted as `CATALOGUE_PERFORMANCE_REPORT` (revenue trend by genre) — L2; Pro plan; aggregate revenue by genre — no artiste_ref_id, royalty splits, or contract terms (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for royalty distribution; Tier 3 for international streaming deal management

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-recording-label`. `registerRecordingLabelVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Royalty splits as integer basis points (bps). All monetary in kobo (P9). Artiste_ref_id opaque. No contract terms or royalty splits in AI (P13). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `coson_registered`; artiste with integer royalty_split_bps (verify 7050 = 70.5%); release with integer streaming_revenue_kobo; royalty distribution with integer artiste_share_kobo, label_share_kobo; verify artiste_share_kobo + label_share_kobo = gross_kobo (kobo arithmetic test); AI catalogue report with aiRights + NDPR; royalty split in AI → P13 blocked; float bps rejected; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/recording-label): Record Label vertical — artiste roster, royalties in bps, COSON, AI catalogue (M12)"`. PR checklist: integer bps royalty (no floats), P13 contract exclusion, COSON gate, standard checks.

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in talent management and modelling agency software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian talent management sector — NMMA, state entertainment commission awareness, brand deal management, talent commission tracking (commission_bps INTEGER basis points); talent profiles are sensitive (P13); deal terms never to AI; L2 cap.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: talent roster (talent_ref_id opaque, category: model/actor/singer/influencer/MC, commission_bps INTEGER), booking management (brand_ref_id opaque, booking_date, deliverable_type, brand_fee_kobo, commission_kobo, talent_payout_kobo, status), campaign calendar, talent portfolio reference (image/video URLs — not stored in D1, only references).

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `talent_agency_profiles` (agency_name, NMMA_registration, state_entertainment_cert, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `talent_roster` (talent_ref_id TEXT, category, commission_bps INTEGER, signed_date INTEGER, status (active/inactive/released), tenant_id); `talent_bookings` (talent_ref_id, brand_ref_id TEXT, booking_date INTEGER, deliverable_type, brand_fee_kobo, commission_kobo, talent_payout_kobo, status (enquiry/confirmed/delivered/paid), tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `nmma_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `TALENT_BOOKING_OPTIMIZATION` (booking pipeline revenue by talent category) — L2; Growth plan; aggregate booking counts and revenue — no talent_ref_id or deal terms (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for talent payout; Tier 3 for international brand deals above ₦5M

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-talent-agency`. `registerTalentAgencyVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Commission as integer bps. Kobo (P9). Talent_ref_id opaque. No deal terms in AI (P13). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `nmma_verified`; talent with integer commission_bps; booking with integer brand_fee_kobo, commission_kobo, talent_payout_kobo; verify commission_kobo + talent_payout_kobo = brand_fee_kobo; AI booking report with aiRights + NDPR; deal terms in AI → P13 blocked; float bps rejected; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Finalize and push:**

```bash
git commit -m "feat(vertical/talent-agency): Talent Agency vertical — talent roster, bookings, commission bps, AI pipeline (M12)"
git push origin feat/vertical-talent-agency
```
PR checklist:
- [ ] Vertical registered in FSM
- [ ] Migration: commission_bps as INTEGER (no float columns)
- [ ] Fee arithmetic test: commission_kobo + talent_payout_kobo = brand_fee_kobo verified
- [ ] `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- [ ] PR labeled: `3in1:pillar-1`, `3in1:pillar-2`, `3in1:pillar-3`
- [ ] P13: talent identity and deal terms excluded from AI
- [ ] AI at L2 autonomy cap
- [ ] USSD exclusion enforced (P12); NDPR consent mandatory (P10)
- [ ] T3 on all D1 queries
- [ ] Tests ≥ 15, all passing
- [ ] Zero typecheck errors (`pnpm -r typecheck`)
- [ ] Zero lint errors (`pnpm -r lint`)
